p0_critical_bugs.title: Patient Creation - is_active Invalid Keyword Argument
p0_critical_bugs.root_cause: PatientRepositoryBase.create() and update() methods passing unsanitized data dictionary to Patient model constructor. The is_active field was included in data but Patient model doesn't have this column.
p0_critical_bugs.error_message: TypeError: 'is_active' is an invalid keyword argument for Patient
p0_critical_bugs.impact: BLOCKING - All patient creation requests failed with 500 error
p0_critical_bugs.fix_approach: Extract is_active from data before passing to Patient(**data) - matching pattern for phone, email, cpf fields

p0_critical_bugs.title: Async/Sync Mismatch in PatientIntegrityService
p0_critical_bugs.root_cause: Methods declared with 'async def' but using synchronous database operations (self.db.query(), query.first()). Created invalid Python syntax when methods called each other with await.
p0_critical_bugs.impact: BLOCKING - Application failed to start, import errors on all patient endpoints
p0_critical_bugs.fix_approach: Remove 'async' keyword from methods using synchronous SQLAlchemy session. Remove 'await' from calls to these methods.
p0_critical_bugs.test_status: Application starts successfully, tests can import

p0_critical_bugs.title: Database Connection Pool - Worker Count Miscalculation
p0_critical_bugs.root_cause: get_worker_count() defaults to 4 workers but development servers use 1 worker. Development pool config (20+30 per worker) × 4 workers = 200 connections, exceeding AWS RDS t3.micro limit (~80)
p0_critical_bugs.error_message: ValidationError: total_connections (200) exceeds AWS RDS limits (~80)
p0_critical_bugs.impact: CRITICAL - Would fail in production deployment, connection pool exhaustion
p0_critical_bugs.fix_approach: 1) Smart worker detection: default to 1 for dev, require explicit config for prod. 2) Reduce dev pool from 20/30 to 5/5. 3) Add validation for all environments.

p0_critical_bugs.title: Template Injection Vulnerability
p0_critical_bugs.root_cause: Unsanitized user input (patient names, URLs) passed directly to template.format() allowing XSS, HTML injection, and malicious URL injection
p0_critical_bugs.error_message: N/A - Security vulnerability, no runtime error
p0_critical_bugs.impact: SECURITY CRITICAL - XSS attacks, credential theft, session hijacking possible
p0_critical_bugs.fix_approach: Created centralized TemplateSanitizer using markupsafe.escape for HTML/script tags, URL validation to block javascript: and data: schemes

p0_critical_bugs.title: SQL String Concatenation Vulnerability
p0_critical_bugs.root_cause: String concatenation for SQL queries (optimized_query += 'LIMIT 1000') instead of parameterized queries, allowing SQL injection
p0_critical_bugs.error_message: N/A - Security vulnerability, no runtime error
p0_critical_bugs.impact: SECURITY CRITICAL - Complete database compromise, patient data breach, HIPAA violations
p0_critical_bugs.fix_approach: Replace all string concatenation with SQLAlchemy query builder API (query.limit().offset()). Add regex validation for table/index names.
p0_critical_bugs.test_status: All database operations use SQLAlchemy API

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: FastAPI Initialization Timeout - Firebase Admin SDK
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: Synchronous Firebase SDK initialization during startup with no timeout. Network call to Google OAuth endpoint can take 10-30s, blocking entire app startup
p1_high_priority_bugs.impact: HIGH - App startup takes 14-56s (best to worst case), test reliability 60-70%
p1_high_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Add 10s timeout wrapper using asyncio.wait_for. Implement circuit breaker for fast-fail. Enable graceful degradation without Firebase.

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: Redis Connection - Multiple Timeout Attempts
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: Sequential Redis connection attempts with 5-10s timeouts each. Three separate connection attempts during startup with no shared connection.
p1_high_priority_bugs.impact: HIGH - 15-20s additional startup time on Redis failures
p1_high_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Reduce startup timeout to 2s for fast-fail. Share Redis connection across components. Add aggressive timeout override during startup phase.

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: Sequential Service Initialization - No Parallelization
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: All services initialized sequentially during startup (monitoring, websocket, redis, session manager, AI, etc.). No parallelization of independent services.
p1_high_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Implement asyncio.gather() for independent services (monitoring, websocket, AI, enums). Keep dependent services sequential (redis pubsub after websocket).

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: Patient Test Payloads - Missing Required Fields
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: Test payloads missing required 'email' and 'birth_date' fields. Causes 422 Unprocessable Entity errors.
p1_high_priority_bugs.impact: HIGH - All patient creation tests fail
p1_high_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Add email and birth_date to all test payloads. Pattern: {name, cpf, email, birth_date, phone}

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: Quiz Session Endpoint - 405 Method Not Allowed
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: Missing POST handler for quiz session creation or incorrect endpoint path registration
p1_high_priority_bugs.impact: HIGH - Quiz session creation tests fail
p1_high_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Option A: Add missing POST handler. Option B: Fix test endpoint path to match router registration.

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: Integration Tests - Broken get_db Import
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: Database refactoring moved get_db function. Tests still import from old path: app.core.database_config
p1_high_priority_bugs.impact: HIGH - All integration tests fail to import
p1_high_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Update import to: from app.database import get_db

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: CPF Normalization - Silent Truncation
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: Invalid CPF values silently truncated instead of raising ValidationError
p1_high_priority_bugs.impact: HIGH - Data integrity issue, invalid CPFs stored in database
p1_high_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Raise ValidationError for invalid CPF format instead of truncating

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: Missing Phone Validation on Patient Creation
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: Create endpoint doesn't verify phone format/validity before starting saga orchestration
p1_high_priority_bugs.impact: HIGH - Invalid phone numbers can start saga, wasting resources
p1_high_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Add phone validation check before saga.orchestrate_patient_creation()

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: Idempotency Race Condition
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: Database check and Redis check for duplicate patients not atomic. Race condition allows duplicate creation.
p1_high_priority_bugs.impact: HIGH - Duplicate patient records possible under concurrent requests
p1_high_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Use atomic Redis lock or database UPSERT for idempotency check

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: Test Rate Limiting Causing False Failures
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: Tests hitting 429 Too Many Requests (20/hour limit). Rate limiter not bypassed for test suite.
p1_high_priority_bugs.impact: HIGH - 4/9 tests skipped, 1 test failed due to rate limiting (not actual bugs)
p1_high_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Add @pytest.mark.slow_api or rate limit bypass for test environment

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: Implicit Optional Type Hints (PEP 484 Violation)
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: Parameters with default None use implicit Optional. Modern Python requires explicit Optional[T] annotation.
p1_high_priority_bugs.impact: MEDIUM - Type checking incomplete, IDE autocomplete reduced
p1_high_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Add from typing import Optional. Update def __init__(self, service: Optional[str] = None)

p1_high_priority_bugs.title: Missing Type Stubs for jsonschema
p1_high_priority_bugs.root_cause: jsonschema library type stubs not installed
p1_high_priority_bugs.impact: MEDIUM - Incomplete type checking for jsonschema code

p2_medium_priority_bugs.title: God Service Anti-Pattern - PatientIntegrityService
p2_medium_priority_bugs.root_cause: Single service with too many responsibilities (validation, duplicate checking, CPF/email/phone validation, saga coordination)

p2_medium_priority_bugs.title: Deprecated Method Still Callable
p2_medium_priority_bugs.root_cause: validate_patient_creation() method marked as deprecated but still callable and used
p2_medium_priority_bugs.impact: MEDIUM - Code confusion, potential bugs from using old API
p2_medium_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Remove deprecated method, update all callers to use validate_patient_data()

p2_medium_priority_bugs.title: N+1 Query Risk - Inconsistent Eager Loading
p2_medium_priority_bugs.root_cause: Eager loading (joinedload) not consistently applied across all query methods
p2_medium_priority_bugs.impact: MEDIUM - Potential N+1 queries, slower API responses
p2_medium_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Audit all query methods, apply consistent eager loading strategy

p2_medium_priority_bugs.title: Duplicate Code - UUID Parsing + Patient Lookup
p2_medium_priority_bugs.root_cause: UUID parsing and patient lookup pattern repeated across multiple router files
p2_medium_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Create shared utility function for UUID validation + patient lookup

p2_medium_priority_bugs.title: Information Disclosure in Exception Messages
p2_medium_priority_bugs.root_cause: Exception messages returned to client may leak internal implementation details
p2_medium_priority_bugs.impact: MEDIUM - Potential information leakage, security best practices
p2_medium_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Sanitize exception messages, return generic errors to client, log details server-side

p2_medium_priority_bugs.title: Rate Limiting Bypass - Validation Endpoint CPF Enumeration
p2_medium_priority_bugs.root_cause: Validation endpoint could be used to enumerate valid CPFs without proper rate limiting
p2_medium_priority_bugs.impact: MEDIUM - Potential data exposure through enumeration
p2_medium_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Add aggressive rate limiting to validation endpoints, consider CAPTCHA

p2_medium_priority_bugs.title: Missing Variable Type Annotations
p2_medium_priority_bugs.root_cause: Dict and list variables lack type hints (error_details = {} instead of error_details: Dict[str, Any] = {})
p2_medium_priority_bugs.impact: LOW - IDE autocomplete reduced, type checking incomplete
p2_medium_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Add type annotations to all variables: config: Dict[str, Any] = {}, items: List[str] = []

p2_medium_priority_bugs.title: Type Assignment Issues in TemplateSanitizer
p2_medium_priority_bugs.root_cause: clean_value: str = sanitize_number(value) but sanitize_number returns int|float, not str. Type narrowing needed.
p2_medium_priority_bugs.impact: LOW - Type checker confusion, runtime works correctly
p2_medium_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Update return type annotations or use Union types: def sanitize_value(value: Any) -> Union[str, int, float, list, dict]

p2_medium_priority_bugs.title: Test Flow Advance - Using Non-Existent Flow Model
p2_medium_priority_bugs.root_cause: Tests reference Flow model which doesn't exist. System uses PatientFlowState model instead.
p2_medium_priority_bugs.impact: MEDIUM - Missing test coverage for flow advancement functionality
p2_medium_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Refactor tests to use PatientFlowState model, implement flow state transition tests

p2_medium_priority_bugs.title: Debug Endpoint Tests - Missing Auth Mocks
p2_medium_priority_bugs.root_cause: Tests have placeholder 'pass' statements. Need mocks for doctor and admin authentication.
p2_medium_priority_bugs.error_message: TODO: Mock authentication to test with doctor user
p2_medium_priority_bugs.impact: LOW - Debug endpoints only for development
p2_medium_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Implement authentication mocks, test endpoints with different roles

p2_medium_priority_bugs.title: Test Patients CRUD - Portuguese vs English Field Names
p2_medium_priority_bugs.root_cause: Tests using Portuguese field names ('nome', 'telefone') but API expects English ('name', 'phone')
p2_medium_priority_bugs.error_message: Tests marked as @pytest.mark.skip with TODO: Refactor to match PatientV2Create schema
p2_medium_priority_bugs.impact: LOW - Tests already covered by test_route_validation.py
p2_medium_priority_bugs.fix_approach: Refactor test payloads to use English field names matching PatientV2Create schema

recommended_fix_order.impact: Unblock all critical tests, prevent production deployment issues
Improve startup time by 65-79%, test reliability to 95%+
Data integrity, type safety, code quality
